title: 3500pcs Self Adhesive Gem Stickers, Multicoloured Gems for Crafting, Acrylic Glitter Stickers, Sticky Gems for Kids DIY Face Hair Deco
features: 【3500PCS GEM STICKERS】- The set contains 10 sheets of sticky gems with rich styles and different colours, about 3500 gems. Our rhinestones are heart, round, square, flower, teardrop and so on, in different sizes, which can well meet your different decorative needs

【SELF-ADHESIVE BACKING, STRONG STICKINESS】 - The back of the gem stickers are self-adhesive, easy to peel off, no need to use glue, tear it off and stick it firmly to the place you need to decorate. The gems for crafting are sticky and won't fall off after long time use, and peeling off won't leave any traces

【SPARKLING, BEAUTIFUL COLOURS】 - The sticky gems are made of sturdy acrylic, high gloss, sparkling in the light. The beautiful and colourful glitter stickers are perfect for diy beautiful crafts with your kids

【CREATIVE HANDMADE STICKY GEMS】 - gem stickers for kids can decorate the face, also suitable for decorating photo frames, greeting cards, mirrors, scrapbooking, mobile phones and other items, DIY sticker glitter fun, can stimulate children's imagination and hands-on ability
【DIY DECORATION】 - Rhinestones are great for crafts, also can be used as anniversary, birthday and holiday gifts for girls, hobby craft friends, students, etc
description: Product description Self Adhesive Gem Stickers Safety Warning For exteral use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
